haircuts.what_it_is: The classic pomp's cooler, more laid-back cousin. Height at the front, tight sides, but with a more natural, less structured feel than your grandpa's version.How to ask for it:"Medium fade on the sides, longer on top with enough length to sweep back. Modern pompadour with texture, not too sleek."How to style:Work texturizing paste through towel-dried hair, blow-dry while brushing upward and back. Finish with light-hold hairspray for movement.

haircuts.name: The Precision Crew Cut

image.alt: Modern haircut for men: The Precision Crew Cut
image.description: Modern haircut for men: The Precision Crew Cut

haircuts.what_it_is: A sharp, military-inspired cut that's been updated for 2025 with cleaner lines and subtle texture on top.How to ask for it:"Classic crew cut with a medium-high fade, slightly longer on top with textured scissor work."How to style:Apply lightweight styling cream to damp hair, brush forward while blow-drying, then use fingers to create slight texture.
haircuts.how_to_ask_for_it: What it is:A sharp, military-inspired cut that's been updated for 2025 with cleaner lines and subtle texture on top."Classic crew cut with a medium-high fade, slightly longer on top with textured scissor work."How to style:Apply lightweight styling cream to damp hair, brush forward while blow-drying, then use fingers to create slight texture.

haircuts.styling_tip: Toppik Hair Building Fibersare your secret weapon for instantlyfuller-looking hair. Apply Fibers after styling, paying attention to sparse areas along the hairline and crown, to disguise hair thinning and polish your look.

haircuts.name: The Refined Side Part

image.alt: Men’s grooming: The Refined Side Part
image.description: Men’s grooming: The Refined Side Part

haircuts.what_it_is: A sophisticated take on the classic side part with more texture and less shine than its 50s-era predecessor.How to ask for it:"Medium length on top, tapered sides with a natural part line. Keep enough length to style with movement."How to style:Apply sea salt spray to damp hair, blow-dry while combing to your preferred side, finish with matte clay for texture.

haircuts.name: The Technical Buzz Cut

image.alt: Guys modern haircuts: The Technical Buzz Cut
image.description: Guys modern haircuts: The Technical Buzz Cut

haircuts.what_it_is: Not your basic buzz cut – this version plays with varying lengths and subtle fades for a more architectural look.How to ask for it:"Graduated buzz cut, slightly longer on top (#2 guard) transitioning to a #1 on the sides with a soft fade."How to style:Almost maintenance-free, but a light styling cream helps control any longer sections in between cuts.

haircuts.name: The Flow

image.alt: Trendy hairstyles for men: The Flow
image.description: Trendy hairstyles for men: The Flow

haircuts.what_it_is: Medium-length hair that's all about natural movement and texture.How to ask for it:"Layered cut with face-framing pieces, keeping length around the ears and neck. Point-cut for texture."How to style:Work volumizing mousse through damp hair, blow-dry using fingers to create movement, finish with light-hold texture spray.

haircuts.name: The Neo-Quiff

image.alt: Modern haircut for men: The Neo-Quiff
image.description: Modern haircut for men: The Neo-Quiff

haircuts.what_it_is: A modern take on the classic quiff with more texture and less structure.How to ask for it:"Longer length on top, especially at the fringe, with textured layers and tapered sides. Keep enough length to style with movement."How to style:Apply root-lifting spray to damp hair, blow-dry upward using a round brush, finish with matte paste for piecey texture.

haircuts.styling_tip: Experiencing scalp show-through at the crown? No worries. Just siftToppik Hair Building Fibersonto any sparse areas of your hair after styling. Gently pat Fibers into place and finish with a light mist ofFiberHold Spray. Toppik Hair Building Fibers are resistant to weather and perspiration and stay put until you shampoo your hair.

haircuts.name: The Undone Pompadour

image.alt: Gents’ new hairstyle: The Undone Pompadour
image.description: Gents’ new hairstyle: The Undone Pompadour

haircuts.what_it_is: A deliberately messy version of the pompadour that looks effortlessly cool.How to ask for it:"Disconnected cut with length on top, shorter sides but not too tight. Lots of texture through the top."How to style:Apply volumizing spray at roots, rough-dry hair upward and back, use fingers and matte paste to create piecey texture.

haircuts.name: The Short Shag

image.alt: Men’s hair trends 2025: The Short Shag
image.description: Men’s hair trends 2025: The Short Shag

haircuts.what_it_is: A choppy, textured cut that brings rock 'n' roll attitude to a manageable length.How to ask for it:"Heavily textured layers all over, with some choppiness around the ears and neckline. Point-cutting for texture."How to style:Work salt spray through damp hair, air dry or rough-dry for natural texture, finish with light-hold texture cream.

haircuts.name: The Textured Crop
haircuts.what_it_is: A short, low-maintenance cut with plenty of texture on top.How to ask for it:"Short textured crop with point-cutting on top, faded sides, and enough length to style forward."How to style:Apply lightweight mousse to damp hair, blow-dry forward using fingers, finish with matte clay for definition.
haircuts.how_to_ask_for_it: What it is:A short, low-maintenance cut with plenty of texture on top."Short textured crop with point-cutting on top, faded sides, and enough length to style forward."How to style:Apply lightweight mousse to damp hair, blow-dry forward using fingers, finish with matte clay for definition.

haircuts.name: The Center Part

image.alt: Modern haircut for men: The Center Part
image.description: Modern haircut for men: The Center Part

haircuts.what_it_is: A romantic, medium-length cut that falls naturally to both sides.What to ask for:"Medium-length cut with long layers, enough weight to part in the center, subtle face-framing pieces."How to style:Apply leave-in conditioner to damp hair, blow-dry while using a round brush for movement, finish with light oil for shine.
haircuts.how_to_style: What it is:A romantic, medium-length cut that falls naturally to both sides.What to ask for:"Medium-length cut with long layers, enough weight to part in the center, subtle face-framing pieces."Apply leave-in conditioner to damp hair, blow-dry while using a round brush for movement, finish with light oil for shine.
haircuts.styling_tip: For longer styles like the Center Part, Toppik Hair Building Fibers can be strategically applied along the part line and crown area using the Spray Applicator to create the appearance of denser, fuller hair.

haircuts.name: The Mod Cut
haircuts.what_it_is: A sharp, geometric cut with a heavy fringe and clean lines.How to ask for it:"Blunt cut with strong fringe just above the brows, squared-off sides, and clean lines around the ears."How to style:Apply smoothing cream to damp hair, blow-dry using a paddle brush for sleekness, finish with light-hold hairspray.

haircuts.name: The Heartthrob
haircuts.what_it_is: A medium-length cut with natural waves and face-framing layers.How to ask for it:"Medium length all over with subtle layers, enough length to tuck behind ears, natural texture enhanced."How to style:Work curl-enhancing cream through damp hair, diffuse or air dry for natural texture, finish with lightweight oil for definition.

haircuts.name: The Modern Mullet

image.alt: Trendy hairstyles for men: The Modern Mullet
image.description: Trendy hairstyles for men: The Modern Mullet

haircuts.what_it_is: A sophisticated take on the business-in-front-party-in-back classic, with softer transitions and more texture.How to ask for it:"Textured layers on top, gradually longer in the back, soft fade on the sides with connected length."How to style:Apply texturizing spray to damp hair, blow-dry with fingers for natural movement, finish with dry texture spray.

haircuts.name: The Textured Afro Fade

image.alt: Modern haircut for men: The Textured Afro Fade
image.description: Modern haircut for men: The Textured Afro Fade

haircuts.what_it_is: A modern take on the classic afro, featuring a fade on the sides and natural texture on top.How to ask for it:"High fade on sides, natural length on top maintained at 2-3 inches, shaped for balance."How to style:Apply curl-defining cream to damp hair, use pick or wide-tooth comb to shape, finish with light oil for shine.
haircuts.how_to_ask_for_it: What it is:A modern take on the classic afro, featuring a fade on the sides and natural texture on top."High fade on sides, natural length on top maintained at 2-3 inches, shaped for balance."How to style:Apply curl-defining cream to damp hair, use pick or wide-tooth comb to shape, finish with light oil for shine.

haircuts.name: The Curly Top Taper

image.alt: Gents’ new hairstyle: The Curly Cut Taper
image.description: Gents’ new hairstyle: The Curly Cut Taper

haircuts.what_it_is: Embraces natural curl pattern on top while keeping sides clean and tapered.How to ask for it:"Tapered sides with length and volume on top, shaped to enhance natural curl pattern."How to style:Apply curl-enhancing cream to soaking wet hair, scrunch to encourage curl formation, diffuse or air dry.
haircuts.how_to_ask_for_it: What it is:Embraces natural curl pattern on top while keeping sides clean and tapered."Tapered sides with length and volume on top, shaped to enhance natural curl pattern."How to style:Apply curl-enhancing cream to soaking wet hair, scrunch to encourage curl formation, diffuse or air dry.
haircuts.how_to_style: What it is:Embraces natural curl pattern on top while keeping sides clean and tapered.How to ask for it:"Tapered sides with length and volume on top, shaped to enhance natural curl pattern."Apply curl-enhancing cream to soaking wet hair, scrunch to encourage curl formation, diffuse or air dry.
haircuts.styling_tip: For textured styles,Toppik Hair Building Fiberscan be applied to the roots to enhance the appearance of density. Always use Hair Building Fibers as the last step in your styling routine, after other products.
